title: cantinoa stricta
intro: Cantinoa stricta, also known as Betonica stricta, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and anxiety, due to its ability to calm the nervous system and soothe the stomach. The plant's leaves and flowers can be consumed as a tea or used in herbal preparations to alleviate symptoms of stress and indigestion, promoting overall well-being and digestive health. Additionally, Cantinoa stricta has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal benefits and provide relief from various health issues.
